title: Schiedeella eriophora
intro: Schiedeella eriophora, also known as Eriophore, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Bioactive constituents of Schiedeella eriophora include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat respiratory issues, as well as to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
